ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gaze_data" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame of gaze data */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the gaze data was recorded */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the gaze detection */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the gaze detection was successful */,
  "gaze_0_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the gaze position for the left eye */,
  "gaze_0_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the gaze position for the left eye */,
  "gaze_0_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the gaze position for the left eye */,
  "gaze_1_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the gaze position for the right eye */,
  "gaze_1_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the gaze position for the right eye */,
  "gaze_1_z" REAL /* Z coordinate of the gaze position for the right eye */,
  "gaze_angle_x" REAL /* Horizontal gaze angle */,
  "gaze_angle_y" REAL /* Vertical gaze angle */,
  "gaze_velocity_x" REAL /* Horizontal gaze velocity */,
  "gaze_velocity_y" REAL /* Vertical gaze velocity */,
  "gaze_acceleration_x" REAL /* Horizontal gaze acceleration */,
  "gaze_acceleration_y" REAL /* Vertical gaze acceleration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used during the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., computer, smartphone, VR/AR headset) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_data" (
  "session_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between session and gaze data */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame of gaze data */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality of the gaze data (e.g., signal-to-noise ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_data_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES gaze_data ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which the analysis was performed */,
  "heatmap_data" TEXT /* File path to the heatmap data generated from the gaze data */,
  "fixation_points" TEXT /* List of fixation points detected during the session */,
  "saccades" TEXT /* List of saccades (rapid eye movements) detected during the session */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heatmap_files" (
  "heatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heatmap file */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis from which the heatmap was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the heatmap file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the heatmap file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the heatmap file (e.g., PNG, JPEG, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmap_files_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixation_files" (
  "fixation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixation point file */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis from which the fixation points were generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the fixation point file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the fixation point file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the fixation point file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixation_files_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saccade_files" (
  "saccade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saccade file */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis from which the saccades were generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the saccade file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the saccade file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the saccade file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saccade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saccade_files_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between user and role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sessions" (
  "study_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between study and session */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_results" TEXT /* Results of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_calibrations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
